news.summary: Calumet, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLMT) based in Indianapolis, made public their participation in two upcoming investor conferences scheduled for June 2025. The first event, the Bank of America Securities Energy and Power Credit Conference, will be held on Thursday, June 5th. Calumet is set to attend this conference along with other industry peers. This announcement signifies Calumet's proactive engagement with investors and the financial community.
news.headline: Calumet (NASDAQ: CLMT) to attend two investor conferences in June 2025, including Bank of America Securities Energy and Power Credit Conference.

news.summary: In anticipation of the upcoming Memorial Day weekend, Consumers Energy in Jackson, Michigan, has issued a reminder for residents to prioritize safety during spring home projects. To avoid accidents, Michiganders are urged to contact 8-1-1, a no-cost service, to identify underground pipes and wires before beginning any excavation work.
news.headline: Consumers Energy urges Michigan residents to call 8-1-1 before starting seasonal projects to mark underground utilities.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) releases its daily pre-market report from the NYSE Trading Floor. Stay informed with today's NYSE Pre-market update for valuable market insights prior to the start of trading. Kristen Scholer presents the pre-market update on this date, providing essential information for investors and traders. Get a head start on the day's trading activities by accessing this crucial update.
news.headline: NYSE reports Hinge Health and MNTN pop double digits in trading debuts. Kristen Scholer delivers pre-market update.

news.summary: A new report on the construction market in Greece predicts growth in various sectors: commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential. The analyst foresees a 2.3% real-term expansion in the construction industry in Greece by 2025. This growth is primarily driven by investments in transport and electricity infrastructure projects. The report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com and offers insights and forecasts for the construction market in Greece up to the first half of 2025.
news.headline: Greece construction industry to grow at AAGR of 3.4% during 2026-2029, with 2.3% expansion expected in 2025. Major investments in residential and tourism sectors driving growth.

news.summary: BetUS, a popular online gambling platform in the US, has gained a strong reputation for its reliability and game selection. Established in 1994, it offers a wide range of real money games, including slots, live dealer tables, and classic casino games. The platform is known for its easy and secure login process, featuring mobile-friendly options and demo play for risk-free gaming. With a variety of payment methods, including cryptocurrencies, BetUS ensures fast and secure payouts for its users. Despite some drawbacks such as no dedicated mobile app and higher wagering requirements on bonuses, BetUS remains a top choice for American players. To sign up on BetUS, users can visit the official website, fill out the registration form, verify their email, make a deposit, and claim the welcome bonus. Overall, BetUS stands out as a reliable and reputable online casino option in the US market.
news.headline: BetUS is a top US online casino with over 30 years of trusted reputation, offering a wide range of games and crypto-friendly transactions.

news.summary: Following a four-week trial, Chad Reeves and Reese Hopkin have been acquitted by a jury on charges of Battery Causing Serious Injury and Personal Infliction of Serious Injury. The case stemmed from a viral video capturing the final moments of a fight. The trial sparked widespread attention due to the video and ended with both defendants being found "Not Guilty" by the jury.
news.headline: Chad Reeves and Reese Hopkin acquitted in Dodger Stadium beating case after 4-week trial for Battery Causing Serious Injury and Personal Infliction of Serious Injury.

news.summary: A creativity platform called CustomColoringPages.com has been recently launched in Austin, Texas on May 23, 2025. This website allows individuals such as children, parents, teachers, and therapists to quickly create printable coloring pages. Users can generate these custom coloring pages instantly and utilize them for various purposes.
news.headline: New website CustomColoringPages.com allows users to create instant printable coloring pages from text or photos. AUSTIN, Texas, May 23, 2025.

news.summary: A seasoned tech leader with over 20 years of experience, Cereen Varghese has joined Amerisure as the Vice President of Application Engineering. news.headline: Cereen Varghese appointed as Amerisure's Vice President of Application Engineering, with 20 years of experience in tech.

news.summary: Olympia LePoint has penned a comprehensive artificial intelligence literacy guide suitable for both individuals with and without technical expertise. The handbook covers essential topics including the AI Codes of Ethics and the potential future implications of AI technology. Released on May 23, 2025, in Los Angeles, the book delves into thought-provoking questions such as the comparative value between one's AI biometric fingerprint and traditional currency.
news.headline: Former NASA scientist Olympia LePoint writes AI literacy handbook for everyone, covering AI applications and ethics.

This 95-minute indie drama, crafted by Elaine Del Valle, is set to debut worldwide on Saturday, May 31.

news.summary: Toronto-based Real Estate Split Corp. (TSX: RS) has declared a distribution for May 2025, which will be paid out to Class A shareholders. The exact distribution amount has not been disclosed in the press release.

news.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs in the US are seeing a surge in inflows, with over $1.5 billion recorded in just two days - $608 million on May 21 and $934 million on May 22. If this trend continues, monthly inflows could hit $6.68 billion, breaking the record of $6.49 billion set in November 2024. These inflows have helped drive Bitcoin to a new all-time high of $112,000 on May 22. Institutional demand is on the rise, with growing profits signaling Bitcoin's shift from alternative to benchmark asset. Recent ETF demand coincided with $1 billion worth of Bitcoin being withdrawn from Coinbase on May 9, indicating increasing institutional interest. Bitwise predicts Bitcoin could hit $200,000 by 2025 and even $1 million by 2029, potentially surpassing gold in market cap. Despite being the fifth-largest asset with a market cap of $2.2 trillion, Bitcoin still lags behind gold's $22.3 trillion market cap.
news.headline: US Bitcoin ETFs see major inflows of $1.5B in two days, heading towards record month as BTC hits new highs on rising institutional demand.

news.summary: DICK'S Sporting Goods, Inc. will announce its Q1 earnings before the market opens on May 28. Analysts predict earnings of $4.33 per share and revenue of $3.6 billion. On May 15, Foot Locker, Inc. confirmed its acquisition by DICK'S for $2.4 billion in equity and $2.5 billion enterprise value. Investors are also interested in DICK'S dividends, currently at an annual yield of 2.81%, with quarterly payouts at $1.21 per share. The acquisition news has generated investor interest in potential gains. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Dick's Sporting Goods to report Q1 earnings; expected to earn $4.33/share, revenue $3.6 billion. Offer 2.81% annual dividend.

The report, available through ResearchAndMarkets.com, provides detailed analysis by sector including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets. This growth signifies a promising market trend for the construction industry in Singapore.
news.headline: Singapore's construction industry is projected to grow by 4.1% in 2025, with increasing investments in commercial, housing, and transport projects.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, MINT Income Fund (TSX: MID.UN) disclosed its plan to initiate a normal course issuer bid (NCIB) after obtaining approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). The NCIB will be carried out through the TSX and Alternative Canadian Trading Systems, starting on May 27, 2025, and concluding on May 26, 2026. As per the Fund's Declaration of Trust, market acquisitions under the NCIB may be conducted by the Fund.

news.summary: Clip Money Inc., a company trading under TSX-V: CLIP and OTCQB: CLPMF, has released its financial results for the three-month period ending on March 31, 2025. They have observed a significant uptick in revenue, showing a growth of 225% compared to the first quarter of 2024. Meanwhile, their cost of revenues experienced a more modest increase of 35% during the same period. This has resulted in the company maintaining a high operating leverage as they transition into the new year, showcasing strong performance in their operations.
news.headline: Clip Money Inc. saw revenue increase by 225% in Q1 2025 compared to Q1 2024, with operating costs rising by only 35%.

news.summary: The Open Gear Lubricants Market was valued at USD 738.1 million in 2024 and is expected to reach USD 907.9 million by 2030, with a projected CAGR of 3.5% between 2024 and 2030. Factors driving the market growth include increased demand from various industries, growth in bio-based lubricants, adoption of synthetic base oil, and technological advancements in lubrication monitoring. The market is primarily being fueled by the mining and construction sectors, along with improved living standards. However, factors hindering growth include the impact of geopolitical issues, economic slowdown, and challenges in lubricant application and usage efficiency. Key players in the market include FUCHS SE, Kluber Lubrications, Carl Bechem GmbH, CWS Industrials, Inc., and Shell plc. The study also highlights the opportunities and challenges in the market, with a focus on balancing cost and performance. For more information, readers can access the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Global Open Gear Lubricants Market to reach $907.9 million by 2030 at 3.5% CAGR, driven by demand from industries.

news.summary: In Kirkland, Washington, a community event will be held on June 7, 2025, from 1-3PM for cyclists and families in the Seattle and Eastside region. The event will take place outside the Flatbike bike shop in the Totem Lake area of Kirkland. Participants can look forward to games, prizes, and bike-related activities in a safe and tranquil environment.
news.headline: Flatbike in Kirkland, WA hosting Family Fun Day on June 7 from 1-3PM, featuring games and prizes for cyclists.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, in New York, a study highlighted the significance of emotional wellness, indicating cats as key contributors to household harmony. The research, featured in the Journal of Psychiatric Research, revealed that individuals owning cats were 36% less prone to reporting feelings of distress. This demonstrates the valuable role cats play in improving emotional well-being during a crucial period.
news.headline: Dr. Elsey's supports emotional bond between cats & people as they prove to enhance household harmony; Cat owners are 36% less likely to report negative feelings, study finds.

news.summary: Ninon Lizé Masclef has been granted a fellowship worth $100,000 by O'Shaughnessy Ventures LLC (OSV) based in Greenwich, Connecticut. The purpose of this fellowship is for Lizé to utilize brain-wave data to create 3D representations of dreams. This prestigious grant highlights OSV's support for innovative creators and their projects.
news.headline: O'Shaughnessy Ventures invests $100,000 in dream reconstruction AI project creating 3D dreams from brain-wave data.

news.summary: Oak Harvest Financial Group (OHFG), a Registered Investment Advisory (RIA) firm located in Houston, is providing assistance to companies that provide employee retirement plans through their specialized service, Oak Harvest 401(k) Business Services. This service aids in risk mitigation, cost reduction, performance enhancement, and maintaining fiduciary compliance. The news was announced on May 23, 2025, without disclosing the specific source. Companies utilizing Oak Harvest 401(k) Business Services can expect support in managing their employee retirement plans effectively and securely.
news.headline: Oak Harvest Financial Group offers new retirement plan administration for Houston businesses, aiming to reduce costs and enhance performance.

news.summary: Located in Beckley, West Virginia, Pangino is a watch brand that prides itself on disrupting routine with unique timepieces, marrying conventional elements with modernity. (NASDAQ: TMUS) revealed the launch of an offer to exchange any and all certain outstanding senior notes of United States Cellular Corporation (USCC). This initiative was undertaken together with its wholly-owned subsidiary, T-Mobile USA, Inc. The announcement comes following the Securities Purchase Agreement unveiled on May 24, 2024, wherein the Company committed to acquiring specific assets from USCC. This move marks a significant step in the agreement, showcasing the Company's strategic business decisions.
news.headline: T-Mobile US, Inc. starts Exchange Offers for US Cellular Corp.’s senior notes to purchase assets; announced on May 24, 2024.

news.summary: In Bonita Springs, Florida, Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI) has revealed an extension of their tender offer to purchase all outstanding shares of H&E Equipment Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: HEES). The offer includes $78.75 in cash and 0.1287 shares of Herc common stock for each H&E share, as per the terms of the merger agreement dated February 1. This latest development does not include interest and continues the acquisition at the specified terms.
news.headline: Herc Holdings extends tender offer to acquire H&E Equipment Services for $78.75 in cash and 0.1287 shares of Herc.

news.summary: In Toronto on May 23, 2025, Martinrea International Inc. (TSX: MRE) revealed its plan of initiating a normal course issuer bid (NCIB), which has been approved by the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). Under the NCIB, Martinrea is authorized to buy back and cancel a maximum of 7,110,571 common shares ("Shares") within a year. This figure accounts for about 10% of the public float, which stands at 71,105,709 shares presently in circulation.
news.headline: Martinrea International Inc. approved to buy back up to 7,110,571 shares, 10% of public float, in 12 months.

news.summary: Autolus Therapeutics has received a favorable opinion from the CHMP regarding the use of Obecabtagene Autoleucel in adult patients aged 26 and above who are experiencing relapsed or refractory B-ALL. This positive development signals a significant advancement in treatment options for this specific patient population.
news.headline: Autolus Therapeutics gets positive CHMP opinion for Obecabtagene Autoleucel in adults (26+) with R/R B-ALL.
